summary: First round of testing for EndocrinoPront Pro after Neon PostgreSQL migration. Backend (NestJS) and frontend (Vite/React) tested. Core auth flow and dashboard working. One medium-priority user display bug found due to type mismatch between backend response and frontend UserProfile interface.

minor.issue: Login succeeds (201) even without x-tenant-id header - prisma findFirst with undefined tenantId effectively ignores tenant filter. Security concern for multi-tenant environments.

ui_bugs.issue: User display shows fallback 'Médico' instead of actual doctor name. Root cause: backend returns 'fullName' and 'roles: []' (array) but frontend UserProfile type (/app/src/types/api.ts) expects 'name' (string) and 'role' (string). This affects: dashboard greeting ('Boa noite, Médico'), sidebar user section (no name/role shown), settings 'Nome completo' field (empty), and user initials (always shows 'M' fallback).
No data-testid attributes found anywhere in the frontend. All testing relies on CSS selectors/text content. Makes automated testing brittle.

issues: Professional dark sidebar (slate-900) with good contrast - OK
KPI cards with colorful gradients - visually appealing
Sidebar user section shows only 'M' avatar and 'Sair' - no user name or role text (due to name/role bug above)

action_items: FIX (HIGH): Map backend 'fullName' to 'name' in UserProfile OR update frontend to use 'fullName'. Files to update: /app/src/types/api.ts (add fullName field), /app/src/lib/api/auth-api.ts (map response), /app/src/pages/dashboard-page.tsx (use user?.fullName), /app/src/components/layout/medical-shell.tsx (use user?.fullName), /app/src/pages/configuracoes/settings-page.tsx (use user?.fullName)
FIX (LOW): Validate x-tenant-id header in auth login endpoint - return 400 if missing
ADD (LOW): data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, nav links) per testing standards
critical_code_review_comments: TYPE MISMATCH BUG: /app/src/types/api.ts UserProfile.name vs backend returning fullName. Backend also returns roles[] (array) but frontend expects role (string). This is a breaking mismatch that causes user name/role to be undefined throughout the UI.
SECURITY: /app/backend/src/auth/auth.controller.ts - login() accepts x-tenant-id header but doesn't validate it's present. Missing header validation allows cross-tenant data access risk.

MISSING TESTIDS: No data-testid attributes in any frontend component - adds /app/src/pages/medical-login-page.tsx, /app/src/components/layout/medical-shell.tsx etc should have data-testid on form inputs, buttons, nav items

success_rate.backend: 93% (13/14 tests passing - 1 minor security test failed as expected behavior)
success_rate.frontend: 85% (core flows work, user display bug affects name/role rendering)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Database already has tenant 'clitenant0000000000000001' with 2 users (medico + recepcao) from previous seed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is NestJS at /app/backend (port 8001). Frontend is Vite/React at /app/src (port 3000). No /app/frontend directory. Env files: /app/.env (frontend) and /app/backend/.env. Backend uses Neon PostgreSQL (Prisma). The key auth issue is a type mismatch between UserProfile in /app/src/types/api.ts (has 'name'/'role') and backend auth response (returns 'fullName'/'roles[]'). Both login endpoints work correctly. All 11 sidebar items verified. API calls from dashboard (patients, consultations, agenda) all return 200.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: Backend auth service (/app/backend/src/auth/auth.service.ts) returns user object with field 'fullName' (line 200-208). Frontend UserProfile type (/app/src/types/api.ts line 6-12) expects field 'name'. The authApi.login() in /app/src/lib/api/auth-api.ts returns the backend response directly without mapping. So user.name = undefined at runtime.
rca_of_issue.reproduction: Login as rafaellarar65@gmail.com / crucru22. Dashboard greeting shows 'Boa noite, Médico' (fallback) instead of 'Boa noite, Dr. Administrador'. Sidebar user section shows only 'M' initial with no name/role text.
fix_options: Option A: Update /app/src/types/api.ts UserProfile to match backend response: change 'name' to 'fullName', change 'role: string' to 'roles: string[]', then update all consumers
Option B: Map in /app/src/lib/api/auth-api.ts: return { ...data, user: { ...data.user, name: data.user.fullName, role: data.user.roles?.[0] } }
